---
title: 'get_transactions returns as_hex: "" for miner transactions'
source_url: https://github.com/monero-project/monero/issues/8311
author: kayabaNerve
assignees: []
labels: []
created_at: '2022-05-04T09:23:13+00:00'

status: closed
closed_at: '2023-02-06T21:18:09+00:00'
---

# Original Description
I'm currently running a local regtest network offering different responses for get_transactions based on whether or not the transaction in question is a miner transaction or not.

`curl http://127.0.0.1:18081/get_transactions -d '{"txs_hashes":["2d1fa93b2a76f3bfebf244df1f97368f5035350e8d8189560aa4308c0e10b3a9"]}' -H 'Content-Type: application/json'`

```
{
  "credits": 0,
  "status": "OK",
  "top_hash": "",
  "txs": [{
    "as_hex": "",
    "as_json": "",
    "block_height": 12519,
    "block_timestamp": 1651576837,
    "double_spend_seen": false,
    "in_pool": false,
    "output_indices": [12744],
    "prunable_as_hex": "",
    "prunable_hash": "c5d2460186f7233c927e7db2dcc703c0e500b653ca82273b7bfad8045d85a470",
    "pruned_as_hex": "02a36201ffe7610193c4a4b8ebe707022ae29fd80edc12030481348866ef8c3f70ec19376fe68b3495d903d51ac61d6a2401856a45ff8e753978324a17d6a3b9e1b6e016fe0fae7de9961b276e03dfcff9b102010000",
    "tx_hash": "2d1fa93b2a76f3bfebf244df1f97368f5035350e8d8189560aa4308c0e10b3a9"
  }],
  "txs_as_hex": [""],
  "untrusted": false
}
```

`curl http://127.0.0.1:18081/get_transactions -d '{"txs_hashes":["07c57cac19102310049264e2bd6056a801681839bca4d207f6f84573d4bcd073"]}' -H 'Content-Type: application/json'`

```
{
  "credits": 0,
  "status": "OK",
  "top_hash": "",
  "txs": [{
    "as_hex": "",
    "as_json": "",
    "block_height": 14601,
    "block_timestamp": 1651655459,
    "double_spend_seen": false,
    "in_pool": false,
    "output_indices": [14869,14870],
    "prunable_as_hex": "",
    "prunable_hash": "52dba7c6a814299cfada97e578f514fe0d8fe1f0544244786178cc5d8bd57e36",
    "pruned_as_hex": "",
    "tx_hash": "07c57cac19102310049264e2bd6056a801681839bca4d207f6f84573d4bcd073"
  }],
  "txs_as_hex": [""],
  "untrusted": false
}
```

My assumption is miner transactions are identifying as pruned because they don't have a distinct pruned format. I believe they should still appear under as_hex since they're still full transactions though. The workaround is writing code to parse the pruned_as_hex field as a fallback, which potentially may have unintended effects (parsing pruned TXs in general when the intent is solely to parse miner TXs as they exist), yet I'm unsure this field's proper definition as getmonero's docs (the reference I've been using for my work) don't seem to be accurate in describing it.
